title: Krishna Chalisa
intro: Shri Krishna Chalisa - Hymn to Lord Krishna
description:
॥ Shri Krishna Chalisa ॥

॥ Doha ॥

Banshi shobhit kar madhur, neel jalad tan shyam.
Arun adhar janu bimbaphal, nayan kamal abhiram.
Purna indra, aravind mukh, pitambar shubh saaj.
Jai manmohan madan chhavi, krishnachandra maharaj.

॥ Chaupai ॥

Jai yadunandan jai jagvandan.
Jai vasudev devaki nandan.
Jai yashuda sut nand dulare.
Jai prabhu bhaktan ke drig taare.
Jai nat-nagar naag nathaiya.
Krishna kanhaiya dhenu charaiya.
Puni nakh par prabhu girivar dharo.
Aao deenan kasht nivaro.
Vanshi madhur adhar dhari teri.
Hove purna manorath mero.
Aao hari puni makhan chakho.
Aaj laaj bharat ki rakho.
Gol kapol, chibuk arunare.
Mridu muskan mohini daare.
Ranjit rajiv nayan vishala.
Mor mukut vaijayanti mala.
Kundal shravan pitapat aachhe.
Kati kinkani kachhan kaachhe.
Neel jalaj sundar tanu sohe.
Chhavi lakhi, sur nar muniman mohe.
Mastak tilak, alak ghunghrale.
Aao krishna bansuri wale.
Kari pay paan, putanhi taarayo.
Aka baka kagasur maarayo.
Madhuvan jalat agni jab jwala.
Bhai sheetal, lakhitahin nandlala.
Surpati jab braj chadhyo risai.
Masur dhaar vaari varshai.
Lagat-lagat braj chahan bahayo.
Govardhan nakhdhari bachayo.
Lakhi yashuda man bhram adhikayi.
Mukh mahan chaudah bhuvan dikhai.
Dusht kans ati udham machayo.
Koti kamal jab phool mangayo.
Nathi kaliyahin tab tum linhen.
Charanchinh dai nirbhay kinhen.
Kari gopin sang raas vilasa.
Sabki purn kari abhilasha.
Ketik maha asur sanharayo.
Kansahi kes pakadi dai maarayo.
Maat-pita ki bandi chhudai.
Ugrasen kahan raj dilai.
Mahi se mritak chhahon sut layo.
Maatu devaki shok mitayo.
Bhaumasur mur daitya sanhari.
Laye shat dash sahaskumari.
Dai bhinhi trin cheer sahara.
Jarasindhu rakshas kahan mara.
Asur bakasur aadik maarayo.
Bhaktan ke tab kasht nivariyo.
Deen sudama ke duhkh tarayo.
Tandul teen mooth mukh daarayo.
Prem ke saag vidur ghar maange.
Duryodhan ke meva tyaage.
Lakhi prem ki mahima bhari.
Aise shyam deen hitkari.
Bharat ke parath rath hanke.
Liye chakra kar nahin bal taake.
Nij geeta ke gyan sunaye.
Bhaktan hraday sudha varshaye.
Meera thi aisi matwali.
Vish pee gayi bajakar taali.
Rana bheja saanp pitari.
Shaligram bane banvari.
Nij maya tum vidhihin dikhayo.
Ur te sanshay sakal mitayo.
Tab shat ninda kari tatkala.
Jivan mukt bhayo shishupala.
Jabahin draupadi ter lagai.
Deenanath laaj ab jai.
Turatahin vasan bane nandlala.
Badhe cheer bhai ari munh kala.
As nath ke nath kanhaiya.
Doobat bhavar bachaavat naiya.
Sundardas aas ur dhari.
Dayadrishti kijai banvari.
Naath sakal mam kumati nivaro.
Kshamahu begi apradh hamaro.
Kholo pat ab darshan dijai.
Bolo krishna kanhaiya ki jai.

॥ Doha ॥

Yeh chalisa krishna ka, path karai ur dhari.
Asht siddhi navnidhi phal, lahai padarath chari.
meaning:
॥ Shri Krishna Chalisa ॥

॥ Doha ॥

Banshi shobhit kar madhur, neel jalad tan shyam.
You hold a sweet flute in your hands, and your body is dark like a blue cloud.
Arun adhar janu bimbaphal, nayan kamal abhiram.
Your red lips are like the Bimba fruit, and your eyes are as beautiful as lotuses.
Purna indra, aravind mukh, pitambar shubh saaj.
Your face is full like the moon and radiant like a lotus, you are adorned in auspicious yellow garments.
Jai manmohan madan chhavi, krishnachandra maharaj.
Victory to the fascinator of the mind, whose image is more beautiful than Cupid, Lord Krishnachandra.

॥ Chaupai ॥

Jai yadunandan jai jagvandan.
Victory to the delight of the Yadus, victory to the one worshipped by the world.
Jai vasudev devaki nandan.
Victory to the son of Vasudev and Devaki.
Jai yashuda sut nand dulare.
Victory to the son of Yashoda, the darling of Nanda.
Jai prabhu bhaktan ke drig taare.
Victory to you, O Lord, who is the apple of the eye of your devotees.
Jai nat-nagar naag nathaiya.
Victory to the clever trickster and the tamer of the Kaliya snake.
Krishna kanhaiya dhenu charaiya.
Victory to Krishna Kanhaiya, the tender of cows.
Puni nakh par prabhu girivar dharo.
You once held the great mountain (Govardhan) on your fingernail.
Aao deenan kasht nivaro.
Come and remove the miseries of the poor and distressed.
Vanshi madhur adhar dhari teri.
You hold the sweet flute on your lips.
Hove purna manorath mero.
May all my wishes be fulfilled.
Aao hari puni makhan chakho.
Come Hari, taste the butter once more.
Aaj laaj bharat ki rakho.
Today, protect the honor of Bharat (India/the devotees).
Gol kapol, chibuk arunare.
You have round cheeks and a reddish chin.
Mridu muskan mohini daare.
Your gentle smile casts a spell of enchantment.
Ranjit rajiv nayan vishala.
Your lotus-like eyes are large and beautiful.
Mor mukut vaijayanti mala.
You wear a peacock feather crown and a Vaijayanti garland.
Kundal shravan pitapat aachhe.
Earrings in your ears and yellow garments look magnificent on you.
Kati kinkani kachhan kaachhe.
A waistband around your waist and beautiful attire suit you.
Neel jalaj sundar tanu sohe.
Your beautiful body, blue like the lotus, looks radiant.
Chhavi lakhi, sur nar muniman mohe.
Seeing your image, the minds of gods, humans, and sages are enchanted.
Mastak tilak, alak ghunghrale.
A tilak on your forehead and curly hair locks.
Aao krishna bansuri wale.
Come, Krishna, the flute-player.
Kari pay paan, putanhi taarayo.
By drinking milk (from her), you liberated the demoness Putana.
Aka baka kagasur maarayo.
You killed the demons Aka, Baka, and Kagasura.
Madhuvan jalat agni jab jwala.
When the forest of Madhuvan was burning in flames.
Bhai sheetal, lakhitahin nandlala.
It became cool just by the sight of Nandlala.
Surpati jab braj chadhyo risai.
When the Lord of Gods (Indra) attacked Braj in anger.
Masur dhaar vaari varshai.
He rained down water in torrents.
Lagat-lagat braj chahan bahayo.
He tried to wash away the land of Braj.
Govardhan nakhdhari bachayo.
You saved it by holding Govardhan on your fingernail.
Lakhi yashuda man bhram adhikayi.
Seeing Yashoda’s mind filled with great confusion.
Mukh mahan chaudah bhuvan dikhai.
You showed her the fourteen worlds within your mouth.
Dusht kans ati udham machayo.
The wicked Kansa caused much trouble.
Koti kamal jab phool mangayo.
When he demanded millions of lotus flowers.
Nathi kaliyahin tab tum linhen.
You tamed the Kaliya snake.
Charanchinh dai nirbhay kinhen.
And made it fearless by leaving your footmark on it.
Kari gopin sang raas vilasa.
You performed the Raas-Leela with the Gopis.
Sabki purn kari abhilasha.
And fulfilled everyone's heart's desire.
Ketik maha asur sanharayo.
You destroyed many great demons.
Kansahi kes pakadi dai maarayo.
You killed Kansa by grabbing him by the hair.
Maat-pita ki bandi chhudai.
You freed your mother and father from imprisonment.
Ugrasen kahan raj dilai.
And restored the kingdom to Ugrasen.
Mahi se mritak chhahon sut layo.
You brought back the six dead sons from the underworld.
Maatu devaki shok mitayo.
And wiped away mother Devaki's grief.
Bhaumasur mur daitya sanhari.
You destroyed the demons Bhaumasura and Mura.
Laye shat dash sahaskumari.
And rescued sixteen thousand princesses.
Dai bhinhi trin cheer sahara.
Using the support of a mere straw-like weapon.
Jarasindhu rakshas kahan mara.
You killed the demon Jarasandha.
Asur bakasur aadik maarayo.
You killed demons like Bakasura and others.
Bhaktan ke tab kasht nivariyo.
And removed the miseries of your devotees.
Deen sudama ke duhkh tarayo.
You removed the sorrows of poor Sudama.
Tandul teen mooth mukh daarayo.
And ate the three handfuls of rice he offered with love.
Prem ke saag vidur ghar maange.
You asked for simple greens (Saag) at Vidur's house with love.
Duryodhan ke meva tyaage.
And rejected the delicacies of Duryodhan.
Lakhi prem ki mahima bhari.
Seeing the greatness of love.
Aise shyam deen hitkari.
Such is Shyam, the benefactor of the poor.
Bharat ke parath rath hanke.
In Bharat (Mahabharata), you drove the chariot of Partha (Arjuna).
Liye chakra kar nahin bal taake.
Holding the Chakra in your hand, you crushed the enemy's strength.
Nij geeta ke gyan sunaye.
You imparted the wisdom of your Gita.
Bhaktan hraday sudha varshaye.
And showered nectar in the hearts of your devotees.
Meera thi aisi matwali.
Meera was such a devoted soul.
Vish pee gayi bajakar taali.
She drank the poison while clapping her hands.
Rana bheja saanp pitari.
The Rana sent a snake in a basket.
Shaligram bane banवारी.
And you became the Shaligram (Lord) for her.
Nij maya tum vidhihin dikhayo.
You showed your divine illusion to all.
Ur te sanshay sakal mitayo.
And erased all doubts from the heart.
Tab shat ninda kari tatkala.
Then Shishupala insulted you 100 times.
Jivan mukt bhayo shishupala.
And Shishupala attained liberation.
Jabahin draupadi ter lagai.
When Draupadi cried out to you.
Deenanath laaj ab jai.
"O Lord of the poor, my honor is being lost now."
Turatahin vasan bane nandlala.
Nandlala immediately became the cloth.
Badhe cheer bhai ari munh kala.
The cloth lengthened, and the enemies' faces turned black with shame.
As nath ke nath kanhaiya.
Such is Kanhaiya, the Lord of all Lords.
Doobat bhavar bachaavat naiya.
Who saves the sinking boat from the whirlpool.
Sundardas aas ur dhari.
Sundardas has placed hope in his heart.
Dayadrishti kijai banvari.
O Banvari, cast your merciful gaze upon me.
Naath sakal mam kumati nivaro.
O Lord, remove all my evil tendencies.
Kshamahu begi apradh hamaro.
Forgive my sins quickly.
Kholo pat ab darshan dijai.
Open the doors now and give me your vision.
Bolo krishna kanhaiya ki jai.
Say victory to Krishna Kanhaiya.

॥ Doha ॥

Yeh chalisa krishna ka, path karai ur dhari.
Whoever recites this Krishna Chalisa with devotion in their heart.
Asht siddhi navnidhi phal, lahai padarath chari.
Attains the fruits of the eight Siddhis, nine treasures, and the four goals of life.
